# Fleet Wave 1 — April 19, 2026
<!-- Status: ACTIVE | Risk: Low-Medium -->

## Request
User triggered execution of the planned improvement backlog. Wave 1 focuses on:
- Session Bloat Warning (proactive context pressure in CLI REPL)
- handle_watch_command decomposition (386L → <200L)
- Copilot Enterprise context limits (add copilot proxy models to context_limits.py)
- Google Drive + Contacts extension (calendar_skills.py)

## Pre-flight summary
- Branch: main | Worktree clean (runtime data files only)
- Auth: DaveVoyles | Risk: Low-Medium
- Test gate: `python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q` (ignore pre-existing test_dashboard.py F404)

## Key files per lane

**Han (Session Bloat Warning):**
- `src/openclaw_cli.py` — `run_chat` fn at ~line 4200 (uses `_run_chat_*` helpers); hook in after `_run_chat_display_response`
- `src/openclaw_cli_session_display.py` — `_context_pressure_snapshot` at line 287
- `src/openclaw_cli_cmd_core.py` — `_cmd_tokeninfo` at line 1389 (pattern reference)
- Pattern: add `_last_context_warn_band` module var; call `_maybe_warn_context_pressure()` after each response

**Yoda (handle_watch_command):**
- `src/openclaw_cli_watch.py` — `handle_watch_command` lines 1222–1608 (386 lines)
- Many helpers already exist above it (_print_watch_status, etc.)
- Extract: init block (lines ~1222–1310), intervention check block (~1310–1350), iteration loop (~1350–1580)

**Leia (Google Drive + Contacts):**
- `src/calendar_skills.py` — extend with Drive API + Contacts API (same OAuth2 token)
- `src/slack_bot.py` — expose `/drive list|read|upload` and `/contacts search|get` Slack commands
- OAuth2 bases: `https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3` and `https://people.googleapis.com/v1`
- Note: existing GOOGLE_OAUTH_* env vars; token may need re-auth with new scopes — document it

**Chewy (Copilot context limits):**
- `src/llm/context_limits.py` — add copilot proxy models (copilot/gpt-4o → 128k, copilot/o1-mini → 200k, etc.)
- `src/model_router.py` — Copilot proxy enabled check
- `src/model_routing_policy.py` — add o1-mini reasoning path for complex queries
- Pattern: query type "complex_reasoning" or "math" → route to o1-mini when copilot proxy enabled

## Done-When Criteria (per lane)

**Han:**
- `_maybe_warn_context_pressure()` fires automatically during chat at ≥80%, ≥90%, ≥100% thresholds
- Only fires when band changes (not every turn)
- Commit pushed; tests pass

**Yoda:**
- `handle_watch_command` ≤200L (from 386L)
- All extracted helpers in same file; no behavior change
- Tests pass; commit pushed

**Leia:**
- `calendar_skills.py` has `list_drive_files`, `read_drive_file`, `upload_drive_file`, `search_contacts`, `get_contact`
- Slack slash commands documented
- Tests or manual verification; commit pushed

**Chewy:**
- `context_limits.py` has copilot/gpt-4o, copilot/o1-mini, copilot/gpt-4.1, copilot/claude-* entries
- o1-mini routing path active for complex_reasoning query type
- Tests pass; commit pushed
